name: valkey-skills
description: 24 AI skills for the Valkey ecosystem - app development, server internals, ops, GLIDE client (7 languages), module development, migration, message queues

interface.shortDescription: Deep Valkey knowledge for AI coding assistants
interface.longDescription: Source-verified reference material for the Valkey ecosystem. 27 skills covering application development (caching, queues, sessions, pub/sub), server internals (C source, data structures, threading), operations (Sentinel, cluster, Kubernetes), GLIDE client across 7 languages, custom module development (ValkeyModule C API, valkey-search, valkey-json, valkey-bloom), Redis client migration, and message queues.
defaultPrompt: Help me build an application with Valkey
